arts.ttl: Sheffield United tease Gus Hamer boost v Leeds United
arts.sum: Sheffield United will be hoping that midfielder Gustavo Hamer is fit enough to face Leeds United this evening, having missed their trip to Luton Town with injury precaution. Keeping Hamer quiet is key to Leeds success v Sheffield United

arts.ttl: Dean Henderson previews Sheffield United v Leeds United
arts.sum: Leeds United travel down to Sheffield United this evening looking to further strengthen their grip on top spot tonight, but the Blades are going to be fired up for a massive game. One individual who was at the thick of the discussion that day was Manchester United loanee Dean Henderson in the Blades goal, getting plenty of stick from the home fans but ending up having the last laugh with victory and then promotion.

arts.sum: Sheffield United can move top of the Championship with a win over Leeds this evening. The second-tier’s top two go head-to-head in a huge showdown at Bramall Lane. Sheffield United have won seven of their last eight to climb into the automatic promotion places. arts.ttl: Tottenham asking price for Leeds loanee Solomon revealed
arts.sum: Leeds United signed winger Manor Solomon on loan from Tottenham in August and the Israel international has been outstanding over the last few months, prompting debate over the possibility of a permanent deal. A report from GiveMeSport this month has now shared that if Leeds are looking to sign Manor Solomon on a permanent deal, they are going to have to stump up an eight-figure sum.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder mind games, feisty Sheffield United reunion and Leeds transfer talk
arts.sum: Sheffield United boss Chris Wilder has pumped up Leeds’ promotion chances throughout the season, perhaps in an attempt to direct pressure onto the Whites. The Clarets play Sheffield Wednesday on Friday, so might have jumped back to within four points by the time Leeds kick off against the Blades.

arts.ttl: Sheff Utd vs Leeds: A season-defining promotion tussle as top two clash
arts.sum: Sheffield United finished below Luton in last season's top flight, but the Hatters are currently battling to avoid the drop into League One, while the Blades are aiming to get back up. Leeds, meanwhile, pushed Leicester and Ipswich all the way in the promotion race last season, only to fall short and eventually lose to Southampton in the play-off final at Wembley.
